prestazioni: Engine: 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6 direct-injection, 300hp stock) with HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (8psi boost, 450hp target) paired with HKS Hi-Power SPL exhaust (dual 3.5" outlets, titanium-coated) and Apexi Power Intake System (heat-shielded, ram-air optimized for 2GR-FKS)

Suspension: Tein EnduraPro Plus coilovers (adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 16-way compression, 50mm drop) with Whiteline front sway bar (24mm hollow, adjustable end links) and Cusco rear strut tower bar (aluminum, 2-point triangulated)

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 85% lockup) with KAAZ 1.5-way differential (for 2GR-FKS AWD models) and TOYO R888R tires (255/40R20 front, 285/35R20 rear) on WORK Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x9.5 +35, 20x10.5 +40)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Alphard-specific, carbon fiber front bumper, rear diffuser, and side skirts) with custom matte PPF wrap (3M 1080 Matte Military Green)
Seibon Carbon fiber hood (vented, 3K twill weave) and RE Amemiya rear wing (dual-element, adjustable angle, 1.2m span) with LED-integrated Gurney flaps

Interior: Bride Ergo II reclining bucket seats (Alcantara/black leather, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, custom rear lounge deletion (replaced with Recaro SR-7 racing seats and full roll cage by AutoPower Industries, 6-point chromoly)
